CAREERS
Take part in a movement committed to eradicating poverty and advancing women’s and girls’ rights across the globe. Crossroads International staff are committed professionals dedicated to working as equals with our partners overseas and in Canada to achieve a more just and equitable world.

 

CURRENT POSTINGS – CANADA

Please check again in the near future for any new postings. In the meantime, learn more about overseas volunteering and what you can do in Canada to create a more just and equitable world. Take a look at our current volunteer job postings.

INTERNSHIP OPPORTUNITIES

We invite you to apply for our internship program, where we offer a dynamic and educational experience. Join us in fostering innovation and diversity as we work together toward achieving our vision at Crossroads International. Our unpaid internship opportunities require candidates to enrolled in a post-secondary program that incorporates an internship as part of a requirement to complete the program. If this resonates with you and an experience that you are interested in, please email us at rh_hr@cintl.org for any inquiries about an opportunity.

ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE (AI) USE IN RECRUITMENT AT CROSSROADS
